SNIPPET:
# Model Router Lab

这是一个继续在你现有 Claude Code 工作区上开发的项目，目标不是聊天壳子，而是：

- 用真实仓库任务做评测
- 在质量阈值和 SLA 时延阈值下自动路由模型
- 双重评分: LLM Judge + deterministic checks
- 给出成本估算与相对基线节省
- 产出可视化报告，方便发 GitHub / 社媒

## 快速开始

1. 检查本地模型

```bash
python projects/model-router-lab/routerlab.py doctor
```

2. 从当前仓库自动抽样任务

```bash
python projects/model-router-lab/routerlab.py sample-tasks \n  --max-files 12 \n  --out projects/model-router-lab/datasets/repo_tasks.jsonl
```

3. 跑评测（支持自定义价格）

```bash
python projects/model-router-lab/routerlab.py benchmark \n  --dataset projects/model-router-lab/datasets/repo_tasks.jsonl \n  --models qwen3:8b,qwen3:32b \n  --judge-model qwen3:8b \n  --min-score 7 \n  --det-weight 0.4 \n  --sla-max-latency 45 \n  --prices qwen3:8b=0.10,qwen3:32b=0.45 \n  --out projects/model-router-lab/outputs/benchmark.json
```

4. 生成策略

```bash
python projects/model-router-lab/routerlab.py build-policy \n  --report projects/model-router-lab/outputs/benchmark.json \n  --min-score 7 \n  --sla-max-latency 45 \n  --out projects/model-router-lab/outputs/policy.json
```

5. 渲染可视化报告

```bash
python projects/model-router-lab/routerlab.py render-report \n  --report projects/model-router-lab/outputs/benchmark.json \n  --out projects/model-router-lab/outputs/report.html
```

6. 生成多代理控制平面（创新模式）

```bash
python projects/model-router-lab/routerlab.py build-control-plane \n  --report projects/model-router-lab/outputs/benchmark.json \n  --policy projects/model-router-lab/outputs/policy.json \n  --min-score 7 \n  --max-latency 45 \n  --out projects/model-router-lab/outputs/control_plane.json
```

7. 查看某类任务的工作流路由

```bash
python projects/model-router-lab/routerlab.py route-workflow \n  --control-plane projects/model-router-lab/outputs/control_plane.json \n  --task-type coding_hard \n  --mode strict
```

8. 模拟控制平面在生产中的效果

```bash
python projects/model-router-lab/routerlab.py simulate-control-plane \n  --control-plane projects/model-router-lab/outputs/control_plane.json \n  --report projects/model-router-
